title: Consistent Horse Armor
description: Consistent color palettes and consistent saddle pads.
body:
**This resource pack tweaks the appearances of Iron Horse Armor, Golden Horse Armor, and Diamond Horse Armor in a couple small ways:**

**Leather Saddle Pads**

> All horse armor variants now use the warm-brown saddle pad which was originally exclusive to Leather Horse Armor.

**Updated Color Palettes**

> The color palettes used for Iron Horse Armor & Diamond Horse Armor have been changed to match their player armor counterparts much more closely.
> 
> This primarily affects the Iron Horse Armor, which is now a lot lighter!
> The color palette used for Diamond Horse Armor only needed small tweaks, making the difference much harder to notice.
>
> Golden Horse Armor already shares its color palette with the Golden Armor worn by players, hence its exclusion.

### Comparison Screenshots:

![There are four horses, each one wearing a different set of horse armor. The resource pack, Consistent Horse Armor, has been applied.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdf02c026d163a3a90428b7a66b8c644331beee2.png)
![There are four horses, each one wearing a different set of horse armor. The resource pack, Consistent Horse Armor, has NOT been applied.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66e47e888964a4d554ff549bf3fe7bcda9bd532c.png)
---
![Two images are placed side by side. Both compare diamond & iron armor sets worn by horses versus those worn by players. The left image has the resource pack applied, while the right image doesn't.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e80d9bbc587f99da212c014049f06f38e74b335.png)

---
---

_Big thanks to ["Horses stay still!" by SozoKa](https://modrinth.com/datapack/horses-stay-still) and ["Simply No Shading" by StartsMercury](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-no-shading) for making these showcase screenshots actually look good!_
